degraded_reason: Single ready bead implemented directly by parent; independent Codex reviewer subagents used for review gate.
review_blocker_summary: Initial HTTP export review requested gzip-by-default request bodies, content-encoding tests, and more precise transport error classification.
Initial failure/no-network review requested applying redaction before real Datadog payload mapping and adding transport error classification coverage.
Updated exporter to apply redaction before mapping, gzip JSON payloads by default, classify timeout/temporary/permanent transport failures, and test request metadata plus sensitive-field non-leakage.
Focused re-reviews approved both blocker sets with no remaining blocking findings.
